title: NewHydrogen Files Patent for its Breakthrough Technology
content: NewHydrogen, Inc. has jointly filed a U.S. patent with UC Santa Barbara for its ThermoLoopâ„¢ technology, a novel thermochemical process that produces green hydrogen using heat and water instead of electricity. Unlike conventional electrolysis, ThermoLoopâ„¢ leverages solid-state materials and machine learning to enhance efficiency and eliminate costly electrolyzers. The innovation enables hydrogen production at lower temperatures and greater efficiency, making it economically viable at scale. By utilizing heat from sources like solar, geothermal, and industrial waste, NewHydrogen aims to significantly reduce the cost of green hydrogen.
author: Analysts Account
